# Silent Peak Kudremukh Homestay

## About
Silent Peak Kudremukh Homestay is a premium mountain retreat in the lush green hills of Kudremukh, Karnataka, India. We offer a peaceful escape with stunning mountain views, home-cooked Malnad cuisine, and genuine hospitality.

## Contact
- Owner: Mahesh
- Phone: +91 94815 80589
- WhatsApp: +91 94815 80589
- Website: https://www.silentpeakkudremukh.co.in
- Email: info@silentpeak.in
- Instagram: @silentpeakkudremukh
- Address: Hosmata, Samse, Kudremukh, Kalasa, Chikkamagaluru, Karnataka – 577124

## Services
- Homestay accommodation with mountain views
- Home-cooked Malnad cuisine
- Trekking (Kudremukh Peak, Kurinjal, Netravati, Gangadikal)
- Horse riding
- Jeep safari
- Camping and campfire
- Nature walks and bird watching
- Photography tours

## Booking
Bookings are made via phone call or WhatsApp. No online payment system.

## Location
Kudremukh, Chikkamagaluru district, Karnataka, India. Near Kudremukh National Park.
